calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Advanced From Apr-14-15 To Feb-11-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for and with Betty Hue and for Judy Lim. James Barringer for and with Kenneth Lim and Robert Lim and for Alyssa Lim.

The Court questioned the notice issue. Mr. Barringer stated every party in interest has received notice and that they have all signed the settlement agreement. Mr. Koplowitz concurred. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Continued To Nov-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Betty Hue and Judy Lim. James Barringer for Petitioner.

Counsel requested a continuance stating that they are working on final touches of resolution. The Petition for Reformation of Trust, etc. was continued to November 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Reformation Of Trust, For Invalidation Of Trust In The Alternative; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; For Quiet Title And Cancellation Of Deeds; For Punitive Damages, Attorney Fees And Costs And Disinheritance For Financial Elder Abuse; And For Damages For Breach Of Contract
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Apperances: Peter Bresler specially appearing for Gerard Lunay on belhalf of Judy Lim and Betty Hue. James Barringer for Petitioner Kenneth Lim.

This matter is refered to the pro bono mediation panel. Completion of the mediation and notification to the examiners is due by June 06, 2014. The status of mediation is set for June 11, 2014, in Dept. 204, at 9:00 a.m. The petition for reformation of trust, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
